changes.description: Replaced verbose 472-line original SKILL.md with concise task-focused skill. Added explicit instructions for log parsing (query string handling, escaped quotes, type casting, conditional message field) and code cleanup (var→let/const decision guide, equality fixes, whitespace fixes). Removed unused regex_tester.py script.
changes.issue: Model manually wrote JSON for 20 log entries and introduced a malformed entry (stray key 'api/settings' broke JSON parsing), causing 0/100 on regex-extract

changes.description: Changed log extraction approach from 'write JSON directly' to 'write a Node.js parsing script'. Added complete code snippets for regex, path query-string stripping, escaped quote handling, and conditional message inclusion. This eliminates manual JSON errors.
Confirmation run — no changes. Both tasks scored 100/100 consistently.

key_insight: gemini-3-flash correctly parsed all log entries but made a typo when manually constructing JSON for 20 entries. Instructing it to write a parsing script instead of manual JSON eliminated the error entirely.
